description: Health Canada approved capivasertib, in combination with fulvestrant, for the  treatment of adult females with hormone receptor (HR) positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2) negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer with one or more PIK3CA/AKT1/PTEN alterations following progression on at least one endocrine-based regimen in the metastatic setting or recurrence on or within 12 months of completing adjuvant therapy.

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

indication.indication: TRUQAP (capivasertib tablets), in combination with fulvestrant, is indicated for the treatment of adult females with hormone receptor (HR) positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2) negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer with one or more PIK3CA/AKT1/PTEN alterations following progression on at least one endocrine-based regimen in the metastatic setting or recurrence on or within 12 months of completing adjuvant therapy.
indication.description: Health Canada approved capivasertib, in combination with fulvestrant, for the  treatment of adult females with hormone receptor (HR) positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2) negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer with one or more PIK3CA/AKT1/PTEN alterations following progression on at least one endocrine-based regimen in the metastatic setting or recurrence on or within 12 months of completing adjuvant therapy.
indication.raw_cancer_type: locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer
